description: Refactor the 'order-service' project to change the data type of the 'id' field in the 'Order' class (com.ecommerce.model.Order) from 'int' to 'long' to prevent integer overflow as the system scales. Ensure the change propagates to all dependent classes, including the Repository, Service, and Controller, such that all methods referencing the ID are updated. The project must compile successfully and all tests must pass.
